steps.name: Verifying successful login by URL and Header
Click on element: By.linkText: Add Employee
Clearing default ID and setting Employee ID: M101
Setting Login Credentials with dynamic username
Searching for the added employee by ID
Click on element: By.linkText: Employee List
Verifying employee exists in the table
